channel.title: Events on Apache Software Foundation Events
channel.description: Recent content in Events on Apache Software Foundation Events

item.description: 2026 Events Community over Code Glasgow — October 11–14, Glasgow, UK

item.title: Apache Tomcat — Hackathon at Community over Code Glasgow 2026
item.description: Community over Code 2026 — Glasgow, UK, October 11–14 Register now | Event website | Hackathon overview Apache Tomcat — Hackathon Coordinator Name — markt@apache.org What We’re Working On We will be working on new features and enhancements to Apache Tomcat. The ideas list is being maintained on the project Wiki. We welcome additional suggestions on the dev@ list if you have an idea for something you’d like to work on.

item.title: Apache YourProject — Hackathon at Community over Code Glasgow 2026
item.description: Community over Code 2026 — Glasgow, UK, October 11–14 Register now | Event website | Hackathon overview Apache YourProject — Hackathon Coordinator Name — email@apache.org What We’re Working On We’re focusing on: Good first issues — small, well-scoped tasks suitable for new contributors: GitHub issues labeled “good first issue” Documentation improvements — help us improve our getting-started guides and API docs Bug fixes — a curated set of bugs that are approachable with mentoring support Resources Contribution guide Dev mailing list thread about the hackathon GitHub issues Slack / Discord / chat channel Dev environment setup Who’s Planning to Attend Name (role or area of expertise) Name (role or area of expertise) Getting Started Before the Event To make the most of hackathon time, we recommend:

item.title: Call For Volunteers, Community over Code 2026
item.description: Community over Code 2026 will be held in Glasgow, UK, October 11-14. Community over Code is an event run by the community, for the community. That’s you! We need your help to make it a success! We are looking for volunteers for a number of community engagement tasks. These roles include: Hackathon Coordination - Help organize and run the hackathon University Outreach - Connect with colleges and universities across multiple departments Meetup Outreach - Engage with local meetup groups Speaker Support - Provide coaching and feedback to speakers Design - Create visual materials for outreach and on-site If you are interested in volunteering for any of these jobs, please:

item.title: Community over Code Glasgow 2026
item.description: Community over Code 2026 — Glasgow, UK, October 11–14 Community over Code is the annual conference of the Apache Software Foundation — bringing together developers, community managers, and enthusiasts from across the ASF ecosystem. Get Involved Hackathon — Dedicated time and space for contributors to work together on real project tasks. 25 projects are already signed up. Call for Volunteers — Help make the event a success — hackathon coordination, university outreach, meetup engagement, speaker support, and design.

item.title: Community over Code Glasgow 2026 — Hackathon Outreach Calendar
item.description: Community over Code Glasgow 2026 — Hackathon Outreach Calendar Conference dates: October 11–14, 2026 — Glasgow, Scotland This page tracks the outreach tasks leading up to the hackathon, and follow-up tasks afterward. Each task needs a volunteer owner. Click “Volunteer for this task!” to send an email to the planning team. item.title: Community over Code Glasgow 2026 — Speaker & Community Outreach Calendar
item.description: Community over Code Glasgow 2026 — Speaker & Community Outreach Calendar Conference dates: October 11–14, 2026 — Glasgow, Scotland This page tracks the outreach tasks leading up to the event, and follow-up tasks afterward. Each task needs a volunteer owner. Click “Volunteer for this task!” to send an email to the planning team. August 2026 MonTueWedThuFriSatSun 12 34Speaker outreach #156789 1011Identify Glasgow-area collegIdentify local Glasgow tech 1213141516 1718Send outreach emails to GlasSend outreach to Glasgow tec1920212223 24252627282930 31 September 2026 MonTueWedThuFriSatSun 1Speaker outreach #223456 78Follow up with colleges/busi910111213 1415Run dress rehearsals with sp1617181920 21222324252627 2829Speaker outreach #3Social media promotion30 October 2026 MonTueWedThuFriSatSun 1234 56Final pre-event check78Event week91011🎉 12🎉13🎉14🎉1516Send thank-you emails to allCollect final slide decks fr1718 1920Follow up with Glasgow colleSend speaker feedback survey212223Social media recapEnsure session recordings ar2425 262728293031 Task Details Pre-Event Tasks Speaker outreach #1 — offer slide review and dress rehearsal help Tuesday, August 04, 2026 Owner: unassigned — Volunteer for this task!

item.title: Events
item.description: Current Events Community over Code Glasgow 2026 — October 11–14, Glasgow, UK Coordinate Your Community Event Here This site is available to all ASF project communities to organize and promote meetups, hackathons, sprints, release parties, or any community gathering. Whether you’re planning something local or virtual, we can help you get the word out. To get started: Read the How to Organize a Small Apache Event guide Copy one of our event page templates Submit a PR to this repo with your event page Send a note to dev@community.

item.title: Hackathon at Community over Code Glasgow 2026
item.description: Community over Code 2026 — Glasgow, UK, October 11–14 Community over Code 2026 — Glasgow, UK, October 11–14 Hackathon Hackathon We’re bringing back the hackathon! Community over Code Glasgow will include dedicated time and space for contributors — new and experienced — to sit together and work on real tasks: fixing bugs, writing docs, tackling issues that need focused attention, and onboarding new contributors. How it works Each participating project provides:
